description: V-belt pulley revolved around Z axis with central bore and keyway slot
components: Revolved pulley body (360-degree revolution of XZ profile)
Central bore (12mm diameter through Z axis)
Keyway slot (4mm wide, 2.5mm deep, full Z length on +X side)
notes: Profile vertices in (X, Z) order for revolution: (6,0) -> (30,0) -> (30,5) -> (20,10) -> (30,15) -> (30,20) -> (6,20) -> closed back to (6,0). Revolve this closed polygon 360 degrees around Z axis using CadQuery. The keyway is a rectangular box: X from 6 to 8.5, Y from -2 to +2 (4mm wide centered on XZ plane), Z from 0 to 20. Subtract this box from the pulley solid. Ensure the revolution produces a proper solid by using a closed 2D wire/face before revolving. The bore is implicit in the profile (inner edge at X=6), so no separate bore subtraction is needed if profile is correctly defined from X=6 outward. Double-check that the revolve operation produces a manifold solid before applying the keyway cut.
